element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Avoid riverbank obstacles while racing against timer
Pick up and apply enhancements during races
Navigate waterfall jumps and fly airborne
Prevent swimmers from being dragged to edge, manually return them to center
Move four protected bombs to detonation site
Defeat boss watercraft at level conclusions

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Graduated difficulty across 25 stages with varied objective types creating alternating tension between time-pressure races and precision-based rescue/defusing tasks

difficulty_curve.early_game: Basic racing mechanics with riverbank/obstacle avoidance, weapon introduction
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of swimmer rescue objectives, complex terrain navigation (logs, whirlpools), ramp jumping sequences including frustrating waterfall jumps
difficulty_curve.late_game: Bomb defusing challenges, boss fights, multi-objective complexity
notable_spikes: Waterfall jumping sequences (noted as frustrating by contemporary reviewers)

notable_level_patterns.description: Speedboat must outpace timer while avoiding riverbank and mid-river obstacles, with ability to attack competitors
Navigate speedboat avoiding logs and whirlpools in upstream river sections
Destroy rogue boats before they drag swimmers to lake edge; manually return rescued swimmers to center if dragged halfway
Move four protected bombs to detonation site within constraints
Combat-focused level concluding with boss fight against enemy watercraft
